loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing event counts and worst deviations for PRIMARY feeders (GIC-01-N3-UPS-01, GIC-01-N4-UPS-02, GIC-01-N5-UPS-03, GIC-01-N8-BPDB-01, GIC-02-N2-BPDB-02, GIC-02-N5-UPS-04); GIC-02-N6-UPS-05 and GIC-02-N7-UPS-06 are dark (no data) and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing AI narrative summary for PCC Panel 1A; per-member event counts (sag/swell/current) are not directly measured by this panel's stub table and rely on the AI model's inference from member data.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-member event counts and worst deviations from PRIMARY feeders; GIC-02-N6-UPS-05 and GIC-02-N7-UPS-06 are dark (no data) and will render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current draw per outgoing feeder (current_avg); voltage and unbalance metrics are not measured by these UPS/BPDB member meters.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel event counts and electrical metrics for the 10 listed panels. Note: GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06, GIC-01-N9-Solar Incomer-1, GIC-02-N1-Solar Incomer-2, and GIC-15-N10-PCC-01 (Transformer-01) and GIC-15-N11-PCC-01 (Transformer-02) are dark (no data) and will render as blanks.
